sidePanel.title: BUILDER
sidePanel.guideHint: Unsure where to start? Head on over to the

ram.description: Short-term working memory. Holds data the CPU is actively using.

gpu.description: Renders graphics and visuals. Handles parallel processing tasks.

psu.description: Converts wall power into voltages the components need.

ssd.description: Fast permanent storage. Loads your OS and apps quickly.

hdd.description: Optional large, slower storage. Good for bulk files and backups.

case.description: Houses and protects all components, and manages airflow.

fan.description: Moves air through the case to prevent heat buildup.

cooler.description: Sits on the CPU and pulls heat away from it.

cpu.description: The brain. Executes all instructions and runs your software.

motherboard.description: The backbone. Connects and lets all components communicate.

buildDesc.fullyFunctionalNote: Your build is fully functional. These are just recommendations to get the best experience.
